text: The Radial Menu is your primary tool for interacting with individual nodes. First, let's make sure we are on the Map Phase.
First, let's select a node. Click the root node in the center of your screen to open its Radial Menu.
onEnter: SC.hideRadialMenu(true); if(SC.kernel.state.nodes.length === 0) { SC.kernel.addNode({title: 'Tutorial Node'}); } const node = SC.kernel.state.nodes[0]; SC.kernel.state.camera.x = -node.x; SC.kernel.state.camera.y = -node.y; SC.render(); if(window._tutInt) clearInterval(window._tutInt); window._tutInt = setInterval(() => { if(SC.dom && SC.dom.radialMenu && SC.dom.radialMenu.classList.contains('active')) { clearInterval(window._tutInt); window.Tutorials.nextStep(false); } }, 200);

text: Clicking a node brings up the Radial Menu. The buttons around the node let you Edit Properties, Create Children, Link to other nodes, or Delete. Hover over them to see what they do!
Clicking anywhere on the background will close the radial menu and deselect the node.
